hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const os=require('os');const projectFile=path.join(process.cwd(),'.sdlc','project.yml');const userFile=path.join(os.homedir(),'.sdlc','user.yml');let out='';let hasProject=false;if(fs.existsSync(projectFile)){hasProject=true;const content=fs.readFileSync(projectFile,'utf8');out+='## SDLC Project Context

```yaml
'+content+'
```

';}else{out+='> **WARNING**: No `.sdlc/project.yml` found in current directory.
> Run `/configure` to set up your project context.

';}if(fs.existsSync(userFile)){const content=fs.readFileSync(userFile,'utf8');out+='## SDLC User Preferences

```yaml
'+content+'
```

';}process.stdout.write(out);"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let raw='';process.stdin.setEncoding('utf8');process.stdin.on('data',d=>raw+=d);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{let cmd='';try{const inp=JSON.parse(raw);cmd=(inp.tool_input&&inp.tool_input.command)||'';}catch(e){process.exit(0);}const cwd=process.cwd();const warnings=[];if(/rm\s+-rf\s+//.test(cmd)){warnings.push('DANGEROUS: rm -rf / detected');}else if(/rm\s+-rf/.test(cmd)){const m=cmd.match(/rm\s+-rf\s+(\S+)/);if(m){const target=m[1];const abs=path.resolve(cwd,target);if(!abs.startsWith(cwd+path.sep)&&abs!==cwd){warnings.push('DANGEROUS: rm -rf targeting path outside cwd: '+target);}}}if(/git\s+reset\s+--hard/.test(cmd)){warnings.push('DANGEROUS: git reset --hard detected');}if(/git\s+push\s+(.*--(force|force-with-lease))/.test(cmd)){warnings.push('DANGEROUS: git push --force detected');}if(/drop\s+table/i.test(cmd)){warnings.push('DANGEROUS: DROP TABLE detected');}if(/delete\s+from\s+\w+\s*(?!.* where )/i.test(cmd)){warnings.push('DANGEROUS: DELETE FROM without WHERE clause detected');}if(/>\.env$|>\.env\s|>\.env /.test(cmd)||/ secrets\.\w+/.test(cmd)||/\.key['"\s]/.test(cmd)){warnings.push('DANGEROUS: write to .env, *.key, or secrets.* file detected');}if(warnings.length>0){process.stderr.write('SDLC Hook BLOCKED:
'+warnings.join('
')+'
');process.exit(1);}process.exit(0);});"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const {execSync}=require('child_process');const sessionsDir=path.join(process.cwd(),'docs','sdlc-engineer','sessions');fs.mkdirSync(sessionsDir,{recursive:true});let branch='unknown';try{branch=execSync('git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD',{cwd:process.cwd(),stdio:['pipe','pipe','pipe']}).toString().trim();}catch(e){}const now=new Date();const pad=n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');const dateStr=now.getFullYear()+'-'+pad(now.getMonth()+1)+'-'+pad(now.getDate());const timeStr=pad(now.getHours())+pad(now.getMinutes())+pad(now.getSeconds());const safeBranch=branch.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g,'_');const filename=safeBranch+'-'+dateStr+'-'+timeStr+'.md';const filepath=path.join(sessionsDir,filename);const content='# Session Checkpoint

- **Branch:** '+branch+'
- **Date:** '+dateStr+'
- **Time:** '+timeStr+'
- **CWD:** '+process.cwd()+'
';fs.writeFileSync(filepath,content,'utf8');process.stdout.write('Session checkpoint saved: '+filename+'
');"
